message:
beads: sync issue tracker — multi-agent proptest and resize work

- Multiple proptest beads closed (circuit_breaker, suggestions,
  config, snapshot_engine, ingest, events, replay, policy)
- wa-1u90p.1.1: resize baseline scenarios in progress
- Various flight-recorder and semantic search beads status updates
  from GentleSnow, BoldBarn, RoseCastle, and other agents
